text.message: bro what kinda rob was that? i have 0 cards and u gonna solo me and take 0 cards?
at least rob a card from someone, not optimal
Didn’t mean to start a game
can you offer wood port service?
did one time for the plow
you decided to keep going multiple times
and i did it when blue was bot
and black and u were same points
no ofc not u just robbed me on 2 points!
if you wanna stop i will
no i will not stop buddy
i've lost anyways. you're the one with a chance here
you can still city and dev.  lol
no chance, i have 0 percent chance to win this
esp. when i got someone robbing me 2 times in a row and im in last place with 2 points
yup.  i know how it feels :)
imagine lowering your own chances even more when someone is also lowering your chances
u do realise that the thing i want most
is for u to rob me right?
so blue or black can have a higher chance
ill give u good trades too blue just ask
I mean... reported for being nice?
i feed everyone, you specifically king make
omg again i didnt get it
red doesnt understand the game, bros u like u have army dude wdym lol
